title: Spleen Collection from Mice and Determination of Spleen Index
author: Amandine Even
materials: The spleen is weighed with a precision scale.

steps.title: The mouse is weighed, which is...
steps.instruction: The mouse is weighed, which is necessary for calculating the spleen index.

steps.title: After an appropriate euthanasia, the spleen...
steps.instruction: After an appropriate euthanasia, the spleen is extracted from the mouse with forceps and scissors. If perfusion has to be done on the mouse, the spleen is harvested after the anethesia of the animal and before the trans-cardic perfusion. Be careful to harvest only the spleen which is dark and not yellow fat or white conjonctive tissues.

steps.title: The spleen index is calculated as...
steps.instruction: The spleen index is calculated as the spleen mass (mg)/mouse body mass (g).

steps.title: If further analyses such as flow...
steps.instruction: If further analyses such as flow cytometry has do be performed, the spleen is quickly transfered to a tube containing cold 1X PBS solution for subsequent splenocyte isolation.
